title: Garten of Banban Obby
description: Obby must survive the Garden of Banban monsters. There are two different tasks available: you can either help Obby on your own or team up with two friends to assist Obby and Nooby. Collect all the gold coins and buy the most beautiful costumes for yourselves. Become the owners of super cool costumes. While escaping, never look back. The monster is right behind you, dont stop running. Run from the monster.
instructions: Steve Press WASD keys to move and jump Alex Press Arrow Keys keys to move and jump Mobile Control Available
